MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_CARD.title: Forge Guard
MYSTS2MOD-SHIELD_BLADE_CARD.title: Shield Blade
MYSTS2MOD-STAR_CHARGE_CARD.title: Star Charge
MYSTS2MOD-STAR_CHARGE_CARD.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. This card returns to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ROYAL_CRUCIBLE_CARD.title: Royal Crucible
MYSTS2MOD-ROYAL_CRUCIBLE_CARD.descriptio: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. For each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold], [gold]Forge[/gold] [blue]10[/blue] and gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_OVERDRAFT_CARD.title: Astral Overdraft
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_OVERDRAFT_CARD.descript: Gain [blue]{Stars}[/blue] {singleStarIcon}. At the start of your next turn, lose [blue]{EnergyDownNextTurnPower}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-WRATH_OF_THE_CROWN_CARD.title: Wrath of the Crown
MYSTS2MOD-WRATH_OF_THE_CROWN_CARD.descri:
Deal [blue]{CalculatedDamage}[/blue] damage. If you have [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] in your hand, deal additional damage equal to [blue]{Multiplier}%[/blue] of its damage, without exhausting it.
[gold]Forge[/gold] [blue]{Forge}[/blue].
MYSTS2MOD-RUTHLESS_CONSCRIPTION_CARD.des: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card in your hand, then add a [gold]Minion Strike[/gold] or [gold]Minion Sacrifice[/gold] to your hand  Draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
MYSTS2MOD-ROYAL_FORESIGHT_CARD.title: Royal Foresight
MYSTS2MOD-ROYAL_FORESIGHT_CARD.descripti: Look at the top [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards of your draw pile. You may put any number of them into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], then put the rest back in any order. Gain [blue]{Stars}[/blue] {singleStarIcon}.
MYSTS2MOD-ROYAL_FORESIGHT_CARD.reorderPr: Choose order to place back (last selected will be on top)
MYSTS2MOD-SPECTRAL_GATING_CARD.title: Spectral Gating
MYSTS2MOD-SPECTRAL_GATING_CARD.descripti: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all Status and Curse cards in your hand. For each card exhausted, gain [blue]2[/blue] {singleStarIcon} and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
MYSTS2MOD-U_WARP_CARD.title: U-Warp
MYSTS2MOD-U_WARP_CARD.description: Choose and discard any number of cards in your hand. For each card discarded, draw [blue]1[/blue] card. Cards drawn this way cost [blue]1[/blue] less energy this turn.
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_DIRECT_LINK_CARD.title: Astral Direct Link
MYSTS2MOD-EMERGENCY_EXTRACTION_CARD.desc:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
Choose a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and put it into your hand. It costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn. At the end of your turn, if you did not play this card, take [blue]5[/blue] damage.
MYSTS2MOD-EMERGENCY_EXTRACTION_CARD.sele: Choose a card to put into hand
MYSTS2MOD-STRATEGIC_RESERVE_CARD.title: Strategic Reserve
MYSTS2MOD-STRATEGIC_RESERVE_CARD.descrip:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
Choose a card in your hand. It gains [gold]Retain[/gold]. If it is still in your hand at the end of your turn, it costs [blue]1[/blue] less energy next turn.
MYSTS2MOD-CORE_EXTRACTION_CARD.title: Core Extraction
MYSTS2MOD-CORE_EXTRACTION_CARD.descripti:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
Choose an Attack in your hand and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to its unbuffed base damage. At the start of your next turn, add a random Attack of the same rarity to your hand. It costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
MYSTS2MOD-SCRAP_ARTILLERY_CARD.title: Scrap Artillery
MYSTS2MOD-SCRAP_ARTILLERY_CARD.descripti: Whenever you draw a [gold]Debris[/gold] or Status card, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to all enemies [blue]2[/blue] times.
MYSTS2MOD-DEFECTIVE_BULWARK_CARD.title: Defective Bulwark
MYSTS2MOD-DEFECTIVE_BULWARK_CARD.descrip: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Debris[/gold] and Status cards in your hand. For each card exhausted, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
MYSTS2MOD-RUTHLESS_EXTORTION_CARD.title: Ruthless Extortion
MYSTS2MOD-RUTHLESS_EXTORTION_CARD.descri: Choose a [gold]Debris[/gold] or Status card in your hand and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it. Gain [blue]{Energy}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and [blue]{Stars}[/blue] {singleStarIcon}. {IfUpgraded:show:Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] card.}
MYSTS2MOD-RUTHLESS_EXTORTION_CARD.select: Choose a Debris or Status card to exhaust
MYSTS2MOD-JUNK_SHOT_CARD.title: Junk Shot
MYSTS2MOD-GRESHAMS_LAW_CARD.title: Gresham's Law
MYSTS2MOD-GRESHAMS_LAW_CARD.description: Deal [blue]{CalculatedDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage. Add a [gold]Debris[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. For each [gold]Debris[/gold] or Status card in your hand, this card deals [blue]{ExtraDamage:diff()}[/blue] additional damage.
MYSTS2MOD-WASTELAND_FURNACE_CARD.title: Wasteland Furnace
MYSTS2MOD-WASTELAND_FURNACE_CARD.descrip: Whenever a [gold]Debris[/gold] or Status card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], [gold]Forge[/gold] [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] {singleStarIcon}, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
MYSTS2MOD-CRUDE_BLACKSMITHING_CARD.title: Crude Blacksmithing
MYSTS2MOD-CRUDE_BLACKSMITHING_CARD.descr: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage. Add a [gold]Debris[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]. Then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Debris[/gold] in your hand. For each card exhausted, [gold]Forge[/gold] [blue]{Forge}[/blue].
MYSTS2MOD-SWEPT_UNDER_THE_RUG_CARD.title: Swept Under the Rug
MYSTS2MOD-SWEPT_UNDER_THE_RUG_CARD.descr: Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards. Then choose [blue]1[/blue] card in your hand and place it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. If that card is [gold]Debris[/gold], gain [blue]{Energy}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-SWEPT_UNDER_THE_RUG_CARD.selec: Choose a card to place on top
MYSTS2MOD-OVERLOAD_DUMPING_CARD.title: Overload Dumping
MYSTS2MOD-OVERLOAD_DUMPING_CARD.descript: Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to all enemies. For each [blue]1[/blue] {singleStarIcon} you have, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Debris[/gold] to your hand and deal an additional [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] damage to all enemies.
